personal.name: Joakim Moléni
personal.title: Systems Engineer — IBM z/OS, Assembler & COBOL

profile: I write assembler and COBOL at the deepest layer of core banking — the code that processes real money, every day, with zero margin for error. One of a small group of engineers in Sweden working at this level. COBOL got me in the door. Assembler is where I found my edge.

highlights: Write and maintain assembler and COBOL at the core of SEB’s banking platform — code where a single defect can halt the bank.
Part of a five-person team recognised as among the strongest mainframe developers at SEB, routinely solving problems others can’t.
Review COBOL across teams, catch missed edge cases, and drive quality in production-critical transaction paths.
Lead risk analysis and incident investigation for core ledger systems — full trace of what happened, where, and why.
Pushing to production within the first week of COBOL training — the fastest in the cohort.
Built and maintained transaction logic for deposits and payments that directly affected daily banking operations.
